# clustr vendored frontend libraries — integrity manifest
#
# Verify with:
#   sha256sum -c VENDOR-CHECKSUMS.txt
#   (run from this directory: internal/server/ui/static/vendor/)
#
# To update a library:
#   1. Download the new minified build from the canonical source URL below
#   2. Recompute SHA256 and cross-verify against a second CDN (e.g. unpkg vs jsdelivr)
#   3. Update this file + docs/decisions.md D23 + CHANGELOG.md
#   4. Commit as a dedicated PR with the word "vendor" in the title
#
# Both SHA256 values below were verified against two independent CDNs
# (jsdelivr + unpkg) on 2026-04-27.

# Alpine.js 3.15.11
# Source:   https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/alpinejs@3.15.11/dist/cdn.min.js
# Cross-verified: https://unpkg.com/alpinejs@3.15.11/dist/cdn.min.js
# License:  MIT  https://github.com/alpinejs/alpine/blob/main/LICENSE.md
beeba63d08956f64fa060f6b6a29c87a341bf069fb96c9459c222c6fd42e58ae  alpinejs/alpine-3.15.11.min.js

# HTMX 2.0.9
# Source:   https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/htmx.org@2.0.9/dist/htmx.min.js
# Cross-verified: https://unpkg.com/htmx.org@2.0.9/dist/htmx.min.js
# License:  Zero-Clause BSD  https://github.com/bigskysoftware/htmx/blob/master/LICENSE
57d9191515339922bd1356d7b2d80b1ee3b29f1b3a2c65a078bb8b2e8fd9ae5f  htmx/htmx-2.0.9.min.js
